summary: Frontend UI testing of PhotoAlbumEditor multi-image layout feature completed. All 19 features from the test request are working correctly. The editor supports 5 different layouts per page (1 bild, 2 bredvid, 2 staplade, 1+2, 2x2) with 1-4 image slots each. Each slot is independently clickable for upload, images can be deleted individually, and layout switching preserves existing images up to the new slot count.
seed_data_creation: None needed - used existing product ID: a59a4b01-95d6-43e9-8174-62dbc9ef7ccc (Personligt Fotoalbum)
context_for_next_testing_agent: PhotoAlbumEditor multi-image layout feature fully functional. Layouts: single (1 slot), two-h (2 horizontal), two-v (2 vertical), three (1+2), four (2x2 grid). Each page has layout property and images array. ImageSlot component handles individual file upload per slot. Layout switching preserves images up to new slot count. Page thumbnails show badge with image count when >1 image. All data-testid attributes present for testing.

frontend.layout_selector_visible: ✓ Layout selector shows 5 options with correct labels
frontend.layout_two_h: ✓ '2 bredvid' layout shows 2 slots side by side
frontend.layout_two_v: ✓ '2 staplade' layout shows 2 slots stacked vertically
frontend.layout_three: ✓ '1 + 2' layout shows 3 slots (1 large top, 2 small bottom)
frontend.layout_four: ✓ '2 x 2' layout shows 4 slots in a grid
frontend.empty_slot_text: ✓ Empty slots show 'Lägg till bild' with upload icon
frontend.slot_click_upload: ✓ Clicking empty slot opens file dialog for image upload
frontend.image_upload_display: ✓ Uploaded image displays in the correct slot
frontend.delete_button_hover: ✓ Hovering over uploaded image shows delete button
frontend.delete_single_slot: ✓ Deleting image clears only that specific slot
frontend.layout_switch_preserve: ✓ Switching layout preserves existing images (up to new slot count)
frontend.page_status_bar: ✓ Page status shows correct count: 'Sida X — Y / Z bilder'
frontend.total_image_counter: ✓ Header shows total image count (e.g., '5 bilder totalt')
frontend.thumbnail_badge: ✓ Page thumbnails show image count badge when page has multiple images
frontend.add_remove_pages: ✓ Add pages (+2, +10) and decrease pages work correctly
frontend.add_to_cart_state: ✓ Add to cart disabled when 0 images, enabled when at least 1 image exists

ui_verification_notes.design_quality: Clean, modern design with proper spacing and contrast
ui_verification_notes.layout_visual: All 5 layouts render correctly with proper grid arrangements
ui_verification_notes.data_testid_coverage: Comprehensive data-testid attributes: layout-single, layout-two-h, layout-two-v, layout-three, layout-four, slot-{pageIdx}-{slotIdx}, remove-img-{pageIdx}-{slotIdx}, page-preview, layout-selector, page-indicator, upload-count
ui_verification_notes.toast_notifications: Success toasts shown for image upload ('Bild tillagd')
ui_verification_notes.price_calculation: Correctly shows base price + extra page cost (5 kr per page beyond 20)
